details: The agent queried the information_schema.columns catalog (not guessing) using `supabase db query --linked`, retrieved all 9 columns with correct names and data types (id: bigint, author_id: bigint, title: text, slug: text, body: text, status: text, view_count: integer, published_at: timestamp with time zone, created_at: timestamp with time zone), and presented the complete, accurate results.
